statement: Lachesis measures only: no authorization, enforcement, retirement, weaving, or rendering. The risk class is ADVISORY.
oracle: scope enforced by the closed API surface + lachesis/scripts/test-metrics.mjs

statement: Never imports clotho/; the only sanctioned cross-package import is merkle-dag/vendor.mjs (canonicalize/sha256hex).
package.json dependencies is empty; Node stdlib + the one sanctioned vendor only.
Any ingestion anomaly throws the whole load; no partial weave reaches measurement. Digest pin + canonical-JSON + closed sets + structure + locator<->id bijection.
Metric semantics are pinned to golden values computed from the committed snapshot; a from/to orientation swap breaks the oracle.
Every trust/identity property Lachesis does NOT establish is an explicit NON-CLAIM record, never a silent gap.
